## Problem

What engineer problem does this change solve?

## Evidence and sources

List official documentation, reproducible observations, or benchmark records. Distinguish measured results from examples.

## Scope

- [ ] Content/navigation
- [ ] Claude-specific guidance
- [ ] Codex-specific guidance
- [ ] Executable example
- [ ] CI/deployment

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] New or changed links resolve
- [ ] Keyboard, mobile, and dark-mode behavior were checked
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or unsupported performance claims were added
